[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001100 3
1 00101101 4
2 00101101 4
3 01110001 4
4 00001111 4
5 00000000 a
6 10000100 2
7 00000000 a

01 10 10000100 2 match 6
12 21 11100010 4
23 32 10101110 5
34 43 01100001 3
45 54 00000000 a match 5 7
56 65 01011100 4
67 76 01111110 6
70 07 10001011 4

02 20 01100110 4
13 31 01001100 3 match 0
24 42 11001111 6
35 53 01100001 3
46 64 01011100 4
57 75 00100010 2
60 06 11110101 6
71 17 00001111 4 match 4

50 05 10101001 4

72 27 11101101 6
